title: La Voix Humaine
overview: The Orchestra of the Royal Opera House presents a new production of Poulenc's short opera La Voix Humaine, featuring soprano Danielle de Niese and shot on location in Paris and London.

trailers.title: La Voix Humaine - Opera star Danielle de Niese film debut and director James Kent on new film
